meaning: adj.[化]分子的,由分子组成的
examples: This substance has now been cloned by molecular biologists.
But these cylinders cling together at a molecular level.
In molecular orbital theory, we named orbits based on their symmetry.
Although Reaven was confident these cascading conditions were linked, he couldn't determine an underlying molecular cause.
You don't have to be a molecular cuisine genius to savor the experience here.
